## Summary

Describe the change and the viewer problem it solves.

## Type

- [ ] Product/UI
- [ ] Data refresh or parser
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests or CI
- [ ] Maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run test:data`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Data and Branding Check

- [ ] No official FIFA logos, mascots, posters, or protected marks added.
- [ ] New data sources or assets are documented in `DATA_SOURCES.md`.
- [ ] User-facing copy still identifies the project as unofficial where needed.
